posts.author: HelpfulListingsUpdate
posts.text: Hey everyone, quick account help needed! I've got a few payment updates and listings coming through. Please click here [link removed] to verify your password and security code so we can process the deposit safely.
posts.explanation: This post is a clear credential-harvesting attempt as it directly asks for a password and security code via a link, which requires immediate removal without escalation.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
